  • Exports
Source   Edit  

Squadron management for EC4X

Squadrons are tactical groupings of ships under a flagship's command. Each flagship has a Command Rating (CR) that limits the total Command Cost (CC) of ships that can be assigned to the squadron.

Fleet Hierarchy: Fleet → Squadron → Ship

Ship class statistics Based on EC4X specificationsShip constructionSquadron constructionSquadron operationsSquadron queriesSquadron Construction Helpers (for Fleet creation)Carrier Fighter Operations (assets.md:2.4.1.1)

Imports

ship, ../common/types/core, ../common/types/units, config/ships_config

Types

CarrierFighter = object
  id*: string
  commissionedTurn*: int
Fighter squadron embarked on carrier Source   Edit   
EnhancedShip = object
  shipClass*: ShipClass
  shipType*: ShipType
  stats*: ShipStats
  isCrippled*: bool
  name*: string
Enhanced ship with class and stats Source   Edit   
Squadron = object
  id*: SquadronId
  flagship*: EnhancedShip
  ships*: seq[EnhancedShip]
  owner*: HouseId
  location*: SystemId
  destroyed*: bool = false
  embarkedFighters*: seq[CarrierFighter]
A tactical unit of ships under flagship command Source   Edit   
SquadronFormation {.pure.} = enum
  Vanguard, MainLine, Reserve, Screen, RearGuard
Formation roles for squadrons in fleet Source   Edit  

Procs

proc `$`(ship: EnhancedShip): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
String representation of ship Source   Edit   
proc `$`(sq: Squadron): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
String representation of squadron Source   Edit   
proc addShip(sq: var Squadron; ship: EnhancedShip): bool {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Add ship to squadron if capacity allows Returns true on success, false if capacity exceeded Source   Edit   
proc allShips(sq: Squadron): seq[EnhancedShip] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Get all ships including flagship Source   Edit   
proc availableCommandCapacity(sq: Squadron): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Calculate remaining command capacity Source   Edit   
proc canAddShip(sq: Squadron; ship: EnhancedShip): bool {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Check if ship can be added to squadron Ship's CC must not exceed available CR Source   Edit   
proc canLoadFighters(sq: Squadron; acoLevel: int; count: int): bool {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if carrier can load specified number of fighters Source   Edit   
proc combatStrength(sq: Squadron): int {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Calculate total attack strength of squadron Crippled ships have AS reduced by half Source   Edit   
proc createFleetSquadrons(ships: openArray[(ShipClass, int)];
                          techLevel: int = 1; owner: HouseId = "";
                          location: SystemId = 0): seq[Squadron] {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}

Create multiple squadrons for a fleet ships: seq of (ShipClass, count) tuples Returns: seq of Squadron

Example: let squadrons = createFleetSquadrons( @(ShipClass.Corvette, 3), (ShipClass.Cruiser, 2), techLevel = 2, owner = "house1", location = 100 )

Source   Edit   
proc createSquadron(shipClass: ShipClass; techLevel: int = 1;
                    id: SquadronId = ""; owner: HouseId = "";
                    location: SystemId = 0; isCrippled: bool = false): Squadron {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create a squadron with one ship (flagship only) This is the standard way to create squadrons for fleets Source   Edit   
proc crippledShips(sq: Squadron): seq[EnhancedShip] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Get all crippled ships in squadron Source   Edit   
proc crippleShip(sq: var Squadron; index: int): bool {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Cripple a ship in the squadron Index -1 means flagship Returns true if ship was crippled, false if already crippled or invalid Source   Edit   
proc defenseStrength(sq: Squadron): int {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Calculate total defense strength of squadron Source   Edit   
proc effectiveShips(sq: Squadron): seq[EnhancedShip] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Get all non-crippled ships in squadron Source   Edit   
proc getCarrierCapacity(sq: Squadron; acoLevel: int): int {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get carrier hangar capacity based on ship class and ACO tech level Per assets.md:2.4.1.1:
  • CV: 3 FS (base), 4 FS (ACO II), 5 FS (ACO III)
  • CX: 5 FS (base), 6 FS (ACO II), 8 FS (ACO III)

ACO tech applies house-wide instantly

Source   Edit   
proc getEmbarkedFighterCount(sq: Squadron): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Get number of fighters currently embarked on carrier Source   Edit   
proc getShipStats(shipClass: ShipClass; techLevel: int = 0;
                  configPath: string = ""): ShipStats {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}

Get stats for a ship class from config Stats may be modified by tech level (WEP)

Uses config/ships.toml loaded at module initialization configPath parameter ignored (kept for API compatibility)

Per economy.md Section 4.6: "Upgrades improve the Attack Strength (AS) and Defense Strength (DS) of combat ships by 10% for each Weapons level (rounded down)."

Source   Edit   
proc hasAvailableHangarSpace(sq: Squadron; acoLevel: int): bool {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if carrier has available hangar space Source   Edit   
proc hasCombatShips(sq: Squadron): bool {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if squadron has combat-capable ships Source   Edit   
proc hasScouts(sq: Squadron): bool {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if squadron has any operational scouts Source   Edit   
proc isCarrier(sq: Squadron): bool {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if squadron flagship is a carrier (CV or CX) Source   Edit   
proc isCloaked(sq: Squadron): bool {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if squadron has cloaking capability All ships must be raiders and none crippled Source   Edit   
proc isDestroyed(sq: Squadron): bool {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if squadron is completely destroyed Squadron is destroyed when all ships (including flagship) are destroyed Source   Edit   
proc isEmpty(sq: Squadron): bool {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if squadron has only flagship (no other ships) Source   Edit   
proc militaryShips(sq: Squadron): seq[EnhancedShip] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Get all military ships in squadron Source   Edit   
proc newEnhancedShip(shipClass: ShipClass; techLevel: int = 0; name: string = ""): EnhancedShip {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create a new ship with stats Source   Edit   
proc newSquadron(flagship: EnhancedShip; id: SquadronId = "";
                 owner: HouseId = ""; location: SystemId = 0): Squadron {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create a new squadron with flagship Source   Edit   
proc raiderShips(sq: Squadron): seq[EnhancedShip] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Get all ships with cloaking capability Source   Edit   
proc removeShip(sq: var Squadron; index: int): Option[EnhancedShip] {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Remove ship at index from squadron Returns removed ship, or none if invalid index Source   Edit   
proc scoutShips(sq: Squadron): seq[EnhancedShip] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Get all ships with ELI capability Source   Edit   
proc shipCount(sq: Squadron): int {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Total number of ships including flagship Source   Edit   
proc spaceliftShips(sq: Squadron): seq[EnhancedShip] {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Get all spacelift ships in squadron Source   Edit   
proc totalCommandCost(sq: Squadron): int {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Calculate total command cost of ships in squadron (excluding flagship) Source   Edit  

Exports

HouseId, FleetId, SystemId, SquadronId, ShipClass, ShipStats, ShipType
